statistics.headline: One Partner For Every Input You Need.
statistics.description: Our trading division consolidates pipes, fittings, fertilizers, seeds, and plants under a single PO — saving you procurement effort.

topics.title: Pipes & Fittings
intro: Our trading division supplies the complete piping backbone for irrigation, landscape, and plumbing projects — drip lateral pipe, PVC pipes and fittings, HDPE pipes and fittings, and electro-fusion fittings, all sourced from trusted manufacturers and stocked in retail and bulk quantities.

Whether you are running a single farm's drip network or a turn-key project across hundreds of acres, we match the right pipe class and fitting to your pressure, flow, and site conditions — and deliver it on time.

topics.title: Fertilizers & Inputs
intro: We supply genuine, traceable fertilizers, pesticides, insecticides, and growth promoters in both retail and bulk packs. Through tie-ups with multinational giants like UPL Limited, Gharada Chemical India Ltd, and Insecticides India Limited, we bring the best products available in the industry directly to the farmers of Kutch and Gujarat.
Our on-field team advises on the right input, dose, and timing for your crop and soil — so every rupee spent on inputs returns real value at harvest.

sections.title: Product Range
list: Brand tie-ups: UPL, Gharada, Insecticides India

topics.title: Seeds & Plants
intro: From hybrid seed varieties and nursery saplings to landscape-grade ornamental plants, our seeds and plants line covers everything a farm, garden, or project needs to get growing — backed by our own Neelkanth and Bholenath nurseries.
We focus on quality, genuine stock and sustainable, "Green" offerings, helping farmers get the best out of their soil for generations to come.
